mapper.select: SELECT h.*, ste.site_nm AS site_nm, ord.member_nm AS order_nm, usr.user_nm AS chg_user_nm, cd_os.code_label AS order_status_cd_nm FROM odh_order_status_hist h LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = h.site_id LEFT JOIN od_order ord ON ord.order_id = h.order_id LEFT JOIN sy_user usr ON usr.user_id = h.chg_user_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_os ON cd_os.code_grp = 'ORDER_STATUS' AND cd_os.code_value = h.order_status_cd WHERE h.order_status_hist_id = #{id}
